cases.query: I want to build a local-first personal finance app; research similar OSS products and propose the architecture.
cases.reason: New product direction requires prior-art research and engineering judgment.

cases.query: This valid zero becomes null somewhere in the importer. Trace the callers and fix the root cause.
cases.reason: A semantic bug needs local-first root-cause judgment.

cases.query: Review this service design for over-engineering and dependencies we do not need yet.
Choose the foundational queue architecture for this new offline sync engine and show comparable projects.
Add this endpoint using the repository's existing authorization and validation patterns.
cases.reason: Normal implementation requires reuse and scope judgment.

cases.query: Refactor this duplicated parsing path, but keep the change small and avoid speculative abstractions.
Do we really need to add another date library here, or can the platform already handle it?
cases.reason: Dependency cost and native capability decision.

cases.query: 像老手一样写这个功能，先看看项目里有没有可以复用的实现，不要过度设计。
帮我做一个剪辑视频的 skill
cases.reason: Creating a new skill requires engineering judgment and prior-art research even without explicit search wording.

cases.query: Build a Codex plugin that coordinates release-note generation across repositories.
cases.reason: A new plugin and agent workflow should enter project-start research before design.

cases.query: Rename foo to bar on line 18 only.
Run the existing formatter on this file and report whether it changed.
cases.reason: Mechanical command with no engineering choice.

cases.query: Translate this architecture blog post from English to Chinese.
cases.reason: Architecture is only the prose topic; this is a translation task.
General knowledge does not require a coding workflow.

cases.query: Summarize the pasted diff in three bullets without reviewing it.
cases.reason: The user requested mechanical summarization, not engineering review.

cases.query: Copyedit these release notes so the English sounds natural; do not change technical meaning.
cases.reason: Non-coding prose edit despite technical vocabulary.

cases.query: Read package.json and tell me the current version number only.
Show me git status and do nothing else.
Change display_name from Video Helper to Video Editor in this existing openai.yaml and make no other changes.
cases.reason: A constrained metadata-only edit is mechanical, not creation or substantial redesign.
